title: Replace dynamic RegExp at flagged sites
goal: Remove the four detect-non-literal-regexp findings by rewriting next.ts to a static per-label regex and converting the phpMapper heredoc-close and projectVersion TOML-header lookups from dynamic RegExp to manual string scanning, keeping the parser tests green.

steps.title: Static per-label regex in matchField
steps.detail: In next.ts replace new RegExp(`...${label}...`) with two precomputed constants (TITLE, GOAL) selected by label; parser behaviour unchanged.

steps.title: Manual heredoc-close scan in phpMapper
steps.detail: In phpMapper.ts replace new RegExp(`\\n[ \\t]*${tag}\\b`) with a manual scan of rest for the closing-tag line (newline, optional spaces/tabs, tag, word boundary), no regex.

steps.title: Manual TOML-header scan in projectVersion
steps.detail: In projectVersion.ts replace headerRe = new RegExp((^|\\n)[section]...) with manual lookup of the [section] line (file start or after newline), returning bodyStart as today.

steps.title: Parser tests stay green
steps.detail: Run existing parser tests (next, php mapper, projectVersion); add tests for edge cases of manual scanning - heredoc without closing tag (runs to EOF), last TOML section without a following header.

steps.title: No dynamic RegExp remains at sites
steps.detail: Verify with ripgrep that the three sites no longer call new RegExp( with a variable; confirm none of the original four findings remain.

autoCommit.subject: Phase 188: Replace dynamic RegExp at flagged sites
